---
title: "The Rev. Henry Tagalana"
---

## The Rev. Henry Tagalana

**Dates:** (<i>c.</i>1849-1901)

### Description

missionary in Melanesia

### Biography

Henry Tagalana\'s story was one of the elements omitted from the revised version of CMY\'s biography of Patteson.  His premarital relationship with his betrothed was a subject of much agonizing by Patteson.  For more details of his career see

See Blain, <i>Directory of Anglican Clergy in the Pacific</i> at http://anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory/

### Letters

- Letter from December 21, 1868.
- Letter from January 22, 1868.
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.
- Letter from January 29, 1867.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
